description: Comparison of accuracy between separate detective (stateless) and auditor-as-detective (with memory) configurations.
analysis: Separate detective (n=2): mean=63.3%. Auditor-as-detective (n=8): mean=60.0%. The auditor-as-detective configuration has access to past round outputs and results, potentially allowing it to learn paraphraser fingerprints over time. The separate detective makes each judgment independently without memory.
